items.caption: A logo for a chain of small coffee and bakery stores. the logo consists of a stylized depiction of a cup of coffee with a sunburst design on top, set against a white background. the cup is black with a handle on the right side and a spout on the left, and the sunburst is composed of red and yellow rays emanating from the top of the cup. below the illustration, the word "panaca" is written in bold, capitalized red letters. above the cup, there is a tagline in smaller black text that reads "coffee and baked goods." the overall style of the logo is simple and vibrant, with a clear emphasis on the brand name and the products it represents.
